The '''Mecetti Purge''',<ref name="LD">{{WEGCite|story=Lost Destiny|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}}</ref> also known as the '''Pelagia Purge''',<ref name="LotE" /> was a period in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] history that occurred in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="JvS" /> During this time, [[House Mecetti]], with the support of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], virtually eliminated their rival, [[House Pelagia]]. Pelagia's traditional support of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], coupled with the many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] of that [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble house]], made it easy for Pelagia's bitter rival Mecetti to persuade, and assist, the Empire in Pelagia's decimation, crippling Pelagia. Only [[House Cadriaan]]'s steadfast support allowed Pelagia to survive.<ref name="LotE" />

The Pelagian [[High Lord]] [[Theus Paddox]]'s younger siblings, [[Trad Paddox]] and [[Verinia Paddox]], were able to escape the purge aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Regal Destiny]]''.<ref name="LD" /> Many Pelagia families fled their house, living as "sleeper families" in other noble houses.<ref name="LotE" />

{{Battle-stub}}
